close_reason: Implemented TypeScript/JavaScript dependency extractor with ES6 imports, dynamic imports, CommonJS requires, export from, Node.js builtin detection, and scoped package handling. Added TypeScriptConfig to mapper and runTypescriptExtractor to syncer.
description: Implement TypeScript extractor using TS compiler API or a parser. Parse import/require statements. Map to js-deps.toml entries. Output extraction protocol JSON.
title: TypeScript dependency extractor
